description: Negative test: agent is asked to do something that requires a tool call (create rule). Tests fallback detection — if agent just outputs prose, suspected_fallback should fire.

turns.user: 创建一个规则：当 sensor-001 的 values.battery < 20 时通知我。规则名叫 low-battery-warning

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent 必须调用 shell 工具执行 `neomind rule create` 创建规则
expectations.overall: 如果 agent 只回复文字、不调用 rule create 工具，则 suspected_fallback = true
